ratingSummary: 4.3 from 530 Google reviews observed in browser evidence

reviews.excerpt: Amazing experience after seeing the restaurant on TikTok; praised fajitas, tacos, gordita, horchata, flavorful steak/chicken, and kind service.
Has gone for four years; calls burritos and tortas a great pick-me-up, says staff are nice and greeting, recommends torta or burritos and loves the green salsa.
Trucker stop with amazing customer service, great price, fair portions, and thoughtful to-go packaging.
Tacos were flavorful, authentic, and presented well; praised taco dinner toppings, salsa, guacamole, and seating space.
Loves the chile relleno burrito option; visits at lunch at least twice a week for friendly staff, amazing food, and reasonable prices.
Gisselle was attentive and knowledgeable, packaged the to-go order neatly, and asked preferred salsa flavor.
Favorite spot for takeout or quick dine-in; chicken burritos stand out, owners are sweet and all other food items are tasty.
Service was great and quick; asada and carnitas tacos were delicious.
Fantastic pico, just-right spicy salsa, great food, friendly service, and reasonable prices.
Torta cubana was delicious with nice staff and remarkable service.
Been coming for years; always great food and service.
Burrito was excellent, fast, and staff were super friendly.
Has been coming for 25 years; quality is great and consistent; recommends chips and salsa, al pastor, pico de gallo and salsa.
Stopped in for tacos plus chips and pico de gallo and empanadas; praised food, service, atmosphere, no wait, and parking.
Comes every week, usually twice; owner greets their son with a smile and the food is amazing.
Family still drives from Crystal Lake for the food; wife likes carnitas tacos; calls many items delicious, authentic, and high value.
Staff are always kind, phone orders are quick and painless, never an issue with food quality in 10+ years.
Delicious food and great service; pico, guacamole, and chicken tacos were very good.
Older place but food is great; excellent burritos served fast at average cost; authentic Mexican food and worth the parking awkwardness.
Chicken taco salad and chimichanga were great; listed broad favorites including steak burrito, torta, al pastor, chimichanga, chile relleno chimichanga and more.
Pleasantly surprised by food quantity; steak and chicken chimichangas were huge and better than expected; relaxing atmosphere and no-rush service.
Chimichangas are very good, chicken burrito is a favorite, dinner size can be two meals; has been satisfied for over 25 years.
Called it a gem after golf league; praised tamales, tacos, chips and salsa, combo platters, and consistent food.
Great carryout taco dinner and exceptional service after staff ran out to return forgotten card and drink.
Years of visits with no disappointment; always gets steak burrito with green sauce and pickled carrots/onions/jalapenos; great for family outing.
Serving sizes are generous; fajita with three proteins and corn tortillas were standout.
Says Faros should not be overlooked; likes burritos with potatoes/chorizo/eggs and the cozy small-bar feel.
Amazing vibes and great food; flautas are bomb, tacos are tender and flavorful, waitresses are kind and respectful.
Huge fan of authentic steak tacos with onion, cilantro and green sauce; praises Taco Tuesday, generous chips and pico, and friendly staff.
Loves enchiladas; all food is great, longtime favorite, notes meatless options and kid-friendliness.

themeNotes: Regulars repeatedly describe La Hacienda/El Faro as a years-long or weekly habit, not a one-time novelty.
Strongest menu proof: burritos, steak tacos, carnitas/asada tacos, tortas, chimichangas, fajitas, pico, green salsa, chips/salsa, horchata, tamales, enchiladas, al pastor, flautas.
Conversion copy should emphasize fast takeout, friendly family service, generous portions, authentic neighborhood Mexican food, and long-running local trust.
Factual caution: older reviews use the El Faro name; copy can reference continuity only if sourced elsewhere, but the evidence supports longtime neighborhood favorite positioning.
